sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
# Find key objects
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'M':
        b = n['boundary']
        r, c = b[0]
        print(f"Magenta at ({r}, {c})")
    if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] == 12:
        rs = [x for x,_ in n['boundary']]
        cs = [y for _,y in n['boundary']]
        print(f"White shape at ({(min(rs)+max(rs))//2}, {(min(cs)+max(cs))//2})")
    if n['color'] == 'G' and n['pixels'] == 12:
        rs = [x for x,_ in n['boundary']]
        cs = [y for _,y in n['boundary']]
        print(f"Dark gray at ({(min(rs)+max(rs))//2}, {(min(cs)+max(cs))//2}) children={[seg['nodes'][c]['color'] for c in n['children']]}")
    if n['pixels'] == 20:
        rs = [x for x,_ in n['boundary']]
        cs = [y for _,y in n['boundary']]
        print(f"Square color={n['color']} at ({(min(rs)+max(rs))//2}, {(min(cs)+max(cs))//2})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
